sections.paragraph:
-

(1) to be white, unused in Kal, see לָבָן , לְבָנָה .

(2) denom. from לְבֵנָה to make bricks, Gen 11:3 Exo 5:7, 14 . (Arab. لَبَّنَ id.)

Hiphil-

(1) trans. to make white, metaph. to purge, to cleanse from the filthiness of sins, Dan 11:35.

(2) intrans. to be white (compare as to verbs of colour in Hiph., Heb. Gram. § 52, 2), Psa 51:9 Isa 1:18 Joe 1:7.

Hithpael, to purge oneself [or, to be purged], Dan 12:10.

The derivatives follow immediately, except מַלְבֵּן.
